# Chapter 8: Electromagnetism: Maxwell's equations as four observations  (~120 pp)
- 8.1 Charge, current, fields (10) · 8.2 Gauss's law (12) · 8.3 No magnetic monopoles (8) · 8.4 Faraday's law (15) · 8.5 Ampère-Maxwell law (15) · 8.6 Electromagnetic energy and Poynting vector (15) · 8.7 Boundary conditions and material laws (15) · 8.8 Worked examples: solenoid, parallel plate, coaxial cable (15) · 8.9 Failure section: ground loops, induced EMI, lightning (15)

**Archetype**: balance, transport, interface. **Project**: measure the magnetic field around a current-carrying wire; verify Ampère's law. **Exercises**: 40.
